narrative:
Ashville-West (precinct in Pickaway County) has 1,003 registered voters, with 60.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.8 percentage points.
